title: 印欧经济走廊，真的，来了
meta_description: 印欧经济走廊，真的，来了 - https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefing-room/statements-releases/2023/09/09/fact-sheet-world-leaders-launch-a-landmark-india-middle-...
contents:
https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefing-room/statements-releases/2023/09/09/fact-sheet-world-leaders-launch-a-landmark-india-middle-east-europe-economic-corridor/

“Through the India-Middle East-Europe Economic Corridor, we aim to usher in a new era of connectivity with a railway, linked through ports connecting Europe, the Middle East, and Asia. ”

难怪习普缺席，印度这是在唱独角戏。属于印度的大时代，可能即将要拉开帷幕了。
